raw_proposal_text: We will dramatically expand Ohio's Earned Income Tax Credit from the current low level to 30% of the federal credit. This is a crucial investment in working families to fight poverty and support local economies by giving hard-working Ohioans more money to spend on child care, groceries, and basic living expenses.

Our campaign will allocate $150 million in state funding to build and support community-based maternal healthcare clinics. We must ensure every pregnant mother has access to safe pre-natal care, pediatric services, and free mental health counseling to improve infant mortality rates across both rural and urban areas.

We will establish a clean energy workforce transition grant program in our Appalachian regions. This initiative will distribute $75 million to community colleges to retrain former coal and natural gas workers in solar installation, wind maintenance, and advanced battery manufacturing.

We will completely zero out the Commercial Activity Tax (CAT) for all newly incorporated businesses in Ohio during their first five years of operation. Eliminating this burdensome gross-receipts tax will unleash unparalleled entrepreneurial energy, attract massive out-of-state investment, and turn Ohio into the absolute capital of job creation.

We will systematically dismantle all state-level regulatory barriers to natural gas exploration. By streamlining the permitting process, expediting EPA signoffs, and fast-tracking local pipeline approvals, we will unleash Ohio's domestic energy production, lower utility bills, and power our manufacturing sector.

Our campaign will establish a universal state-funded vocational voucher program. Instead of subsidizing bloated, ideologically captured four-year university bureaucracies, the state will provide $5,000 direct vouchers to any high school graduate to enroll in trade schools, commercial driving academies, or coding bootcamps.
